summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of luxury perfume catalog application. All core functionalities working correctly including navigation, search, filters, modal interactions, and mobile responsiveness.

minor_issues.issue: Page title should change to 'Destacados' when navigating to featured section, but shows 'Colección'
Mobile sidebar close button click had timeout issues during testing

passed_tests: Page loads correctly with luxury burgundy/gold theme
Sidebar navigation works (all navigation items clickable)
Search input filters products in real-time
Category filters (Todos, Hombre, Mujer, Unisex) work correctly
Notes filter dropdown opens and filters work
Product cards display correctly with images, names, prices
Product card click opens detail modal
Add to favorites and cart buttons are functional
Product modal opens and works on mobile
Header action buttons (favorites, cart, user) are clickable
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix: Update featured section to display 'Destacados' title correctly when navigating to featured products. Also improve mobile sidebar close button interaction.
